title: CBIC Launches Deferred Customs Duty Payment for Eligible Manufacturer Importers
content:
# CBIC Launches Deferred Customs Duty Payment for Eligible Manufacturer Importers

Ek important update hai! Government ne **Eligible Manufacturer Importers (EMI)** ke liye Customs duty ke deferred payment ki ek nayi suvidha announce ki hai. Isse manufacturers ko kafi rahat milegi.

Union Budget 2026-27 mein announce ki gayi yeh pehal, qualifying manufacturers ko imported goods ko bina immediate Customs duty payment ke clear karne ki anumati degi. Ab liability monthly basis par settle ki ja sakegi.

Is scheme ki key details niche di gayi hain:
*   **Scheme ka Naam:** Deferred Payment of Customs duty for "Eligible Manufacturer Importers" (EMI).
*   **Effective Date:** Yeh facility 1st April, 2026 se effective hogi.
*   **Application Process:** EMI scheme ke liye applications online 1st March, 2026 se submit ki ja sakti hain.
*   **Application Portal:** Applications AEO portal (www.aeoindia.gov.in) par "Eligible Manufacturer Importer" tab ke under submit ki ja sakengi.
*   **Guidelines:** Detailed eligibility conditions, application process aur operational guidelines Circular No. 08/2026-Customs dated February 28, 2026 ke through provide ki gayi hain.

Yeh initiative manufacturers ke working capital aur cash flow management ko behtar banane mein help karega, aur Ease of Doing Business ko promote karega.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://pib.gov.in/PressReleasePage.aspx?PRID=2008436)

*Published on: 2 March 2026*
